svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="FreezingArchRule 冻结基线" id="freeze-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-162" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="680" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="R" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="新规则 ARCH-DATA-01
Frozen.frozen(rule)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="340" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FIRST_LBL" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="首次运行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="120" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="存量违规 467 处
写入基线文件（入库）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="70" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="✅ 测试通过
（存量豁免）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="100" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LATER_LBL" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="后续每次运行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="640" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="有新增违规?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="640" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FAIL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="❌ 测试失败
CI 拦下" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="560" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="✅ 测试通过
代码和基线一起收敛" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="740" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="核心：存量不挡路，新增必拦截
还一处存量 → 删一条基线 → 修代码" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="320" x="280" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="R" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="B" value="首次"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="P1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="R" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="C" value="后续"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" target="FAIL" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" target="P2" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
